purpose: Offline oracles for the global rules that had no harness gate yet (M8-T5). R7 (§44) and R9 (§45) already done; this adds R1/R2/R3/R8. A compliant set (good/) must pass all four; a violating set (bad/) carries exactly one rule break per file — the §51 checker must catch each and the good set must stay clean (RED-confirm built in).

rules.R1: never fabricate — every claim record (- BR-/WF-/IP-/KL-/ISS-) carries a file:line citation AND a [HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW] certainty tag
rules.R2: strict input boundaries — every cited path in a subagent record is under one of that agent's declared inputs
rules.R3: provenance header — every emitted output .md carries a provenance header (stage/component/run/inputs/date)
rules.R8: graceful degradation honesty — every analyzed file in the extraction ledger carries one of the 5 fallback tags (graphify/ctags/grep/llm-only/skip); no silent untagged entry
